overview: Geethanjali College of Engineering and Technology (GCET), established in 2005 by the Teja Educational Society, is a premier autonomous institution located in Keesara, near Hyderabad. Known for its academic excellence and Industry 4.0-focused curriculum, the college has been granted autonomous status by the UGC and is recognized for its proactive approach to integrating emerging technologies like AI, Cyber Security, and Data Science into its engineering programs.
accreditation: UGC Autonomous. Accredited by NAAC with an 'A+' Grade. All eligible B.Tech programs (CSE, ECE, EEE, ME, Civil) are NBA Accredited. Approved by AICTE, New Delhi, and permanently affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad (JNTUH).

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech (CSE, AI&ML, Data Science, Cyber Security, ECE, EEE, Civil, Mechanical)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with 45% aggregate in PCM + TG EAPCET rank
Diploma in Engineering with valid TG ECET rank
Graduation with 50% aggregate + TG ICET rank

coursesAndFees.course: M.Tech (CSE, VLSI System Design, Embedded Systems)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: B.E./B.Tech in relevant branch + GATE / TG PGECET score

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are conducted via TGCHE state-level counseling. 70% of seats (Category A) are filled based on entrance exam ranks. 30% are Management Quota (Category B) seats filled based on merit (typically 60%+ in Class 12). Counseling Code: GCTC.
admissions.importantDates: TG EAPCET 2026: May 9–11, 2026; Results: May 17, 2026; TG ICET 2026: May 13–14, 2026; Counseling: June–August 2026.

facilities: Specialized Labs for 5G, Applied Blockchain, and AI/ML
Transport (Fleet covering all major areas of Hyderabad)
campus.specialNote: GCET is noted for its proximity to Hyderabad's IT hubs, facilitating regular industrial visits. It features a unique 'Industry-Integrated Learning' model and has various technical clubs such as the Applied Blockchain Lab and Robotics Club to foster innovation.
